hackathons.description: During the hackathon, our team successfully developed a complete MVP for our startup, GreenShift. Beyond the technical prototype, we managed to produce a comprehensive market analysis and both business plan and model. We set out to solve a major challenge for fleet management companies, such as those in logistics and public transport. These companies struggle to reduce their emissions, encourage consistent eco-friendly driving habits, and lack the precise data required to generate accurate ESG reports. Our solution is an integrated ecosystem that combines a smart OBD device with AI, a local model running on the hardware collects vehicle data in real-time and connects to a mobile app, providing drivers with live coaching to improve fuel efficiency based on traffic, weather, and road geometry. Collected data are sent to a cloud infrastructure where advanced AI models allow companies to monitor fleet statistics and automatically generate certified ESG reports.
